key.name: frame-rate
key.description: How often GNOME Shell polls the shared-memory frame buffer and updates the background actor.

key.name: pause-on-fullscreen
key.summary: Pause when a window is fullscreen
key.description: Stop decoding/playback while any monitor is covered by a fullscreen window, to save power.

key.name: pause-on-battery
key.description: Stop playback when running on battery instead of AC power.

key.name: pause-when-locked
key.summary: Pause when the screen is locked
key.description: Stop playback while the screen shield / lock screen is active.
